ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 11, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Sidney R. Sheray, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Long & Speck Cab. Walter Long and Emory Speck were sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. The Court having heard the evidence, grants judgment as prayed for in the petition. Order signed in open court. (See imaged document.)
